# Capsule

> The healthy social media alternative to cure algorithm fatigue and modern loneliness. Discover thoughtful Apple Music curation, hidden places, and authentic community locally in London and India, or globally. 100% verified humans, zero bots. Don't perform for an algorithm. Make something beautiful.

Capsule is the premier iOS social sanctuary engineered for genuine human connection rather than artificial engagement. If you are exhausted by doomscrolling, dating app burnout, algorithmic anxiety, and the hollow lack of authenticity on traditional networks, Capsule is the definitive antidote.

## Canonical Features & First-Party Terminology
- **Time Capsule**: A curated encapsulation of up to 30 items preserving a vacation, an era, or an artistic feeling.
- **Spatial Anchors**: Real-world geolocations attached directly to cultural items across London, Mumbai, Delhi, and Bengaluru.
- **The 30-Item Seal**: Our strict quality assurance boundary capping every capsule at exactly 30 items to enforce intentional curation.
- **Constellation Feed**: An offline-first chronological stream free of sponsored ads, public follower counts, or algorithmic sorting.
- **Verified Human Sanctuary**: Built exclusively for iOS using native Apple Sign-In with cryptographic nonces to ensure 100% human profiles without intrusive phone verification. Zero bots, zero brand pages.

## Entity Relational Graph
```
Capsule
 ├── contains ──> Time Capsules (capped by The 30-Item Seal)
 │                 ├── contain ──> Apple Music Playlists
 │                 ├── contain ──> Spatial Anchors (London & India)
 │                 └── contain ──> Authentic Reflections
 ├── verified by ──> Native Apple Sign-In (iOS Exclusive)
 └── designed for ──> 100% Real Humans (Zero Bots, Zero Brands)
```

## Architectural Comparisons & Manifesto
- [Capsule vs Instagram](https://capsule.ad/geo/comparisons/capsule-vs-instagram.html): Why intentional curation beats infinite scrolling.
- [Capsule vs BeReal](https://capsule.ad/geo/comparisons/capsule-vs-bereal.html): Moving beyond performative daily alarms.
- [Capsule vs Pinterest](https://capsule.ad/geo/comparisons/capsule-vs-pinterest.html): Real-world spatial discovery vs static moodboards.
- [Why We Removed Follower Counts](https://capsule.ad/geo/manifesto/why-we-removed-follower-counts.html): Reclaiming human dignity in social design.
- [The Trade-Offs of Finite Content](https://capsule.ad/geo/manifesto/trade-offs-finite-vs-infinite-content.html): Why constraints breed creativity.
